subtitle: Fate, handled.
shortDescription: A relationship copilot that starts with better dates and grows into shared-life and legacy support.
fullDescription: Red String is an agentic relationship product for people who want fewer, better first dates and a calmer way to build what comes after. Your AI agent builds a relationship persona, screens compatibility, proposes thoughtful date logistics, learns from feedback, and can graduate a mutual match into relationship, household, and legacy modes.
reviewNotes: The app includes reporting and blocking for match safety.
The app includes data export and account deletion in Settings.
The app is not an emergency service, therapy provider, legal advisor, medical advisor, or financial advisor.
Provider disclosures must be updated when production integrations are enabled.
manualBeforeSubmission: Replace placeholder legal language after counsel review.
Complete Apple privacy nutrition labels and Google Play data safety form from the deployed build.
Confirm provider credentials and update disclosures.
